tasks.title: Create Agent model (replaces Bot + BotVersion)
tasks.description: Create backend/app/models/agent.py with Agent model per technical spec. Delete backend/app/models/bot.py (Bot + BotVersion). Update backend/app/models/__init__.py to import Agent instead of Bot/BotVersion.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Agent model has id, user_id, name, status, elo, total_wins, total_losses, total_hands, consecutive_timeouts, created_at, updated_at
AC-2: Bot and BotVersion classes no longer exist
AC-3: __init__.py exports Agent instead of Bot/BotVersion
GATE: python -c 'from app.models.agent import Agent' succeeds

tasks.title: Update Session, Table, Hand models for v3
tasks.description: Modify Session model: replace bot_id + bot_version_id with agent_id FK, add timeout_count. Modify Table: add current_hand_id, dealer_seat, pending_action_agent_id, action_deadline. Modify Hand: add phase, current_bet, pot_main fields. Remove 'turn' from HandEvent street values.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Session.agent_id is FK to agents table, bot_id and bot_version_id removed
AC-2: Session.timeout_count exists with default 0
AC-3: Table has current_hand_id, dealer_seat, pending_action_agent_id, action_deadline
AC-4: Hand has phase, current_bet, pot_main fields
GATE: All models import without errors

tasks.title: Create Agent schema and delete Bot schemas
tasks.description: Create backend/app/schemas/agent.py with Pydantic schemas: AgentCreate, AgentResponse, AgentListResponse. Delete backend/app/schemas/bot.py (BotConfigSchema and related).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: AgentCreate schema with name field (required)
AC-2: AgentResponse with all Agent model fields + computed winrate
AC-3: BotConfigSchema no longer exists
GATE: python -c 'from app.schemas.agent import AgentCreate' succeeds

tasks.title: Update config.py with v3 settings
tasks.description: Update Settings class in config.py: add ACTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=30, MAX_ACTION_RETRIES=2, CONSECUTIVE_TIMEOUT_LIMIT=3. Rename MAX_BOTS to MAX_AGENTS_PER_USER. Update SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_SECONDS default from 30 to 5. Add MATCHMAKER_ELO_RANGE_CAP=1000. Remove HANDS_PER_TICK and MAX_VERSIONS_PER_DAY (not needed in v3).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ACTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, MAX_ACTION_RETRIES, CONSECUTIVE_TIMEOUT_LIMIT exist
AC-2: MAX_AGENTS_PER_USER=3 replaces MAX_BOTS
AC-3: SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_SECONDS default is 5
AC-4: HANDS_PER_TICK and MAX_VERSIONS_PER_DAY removed
GATE: Settings() instantiates without error

tasks.title: Create Alembic migration for v3 schema
tasks.description: Create Alembic migration that: drops bot_versions table, drops bots table, creates agents table, alters sessions (drop bot_id/bot_version_id, add agent_id/timeout_count), alters tables (add timeout tracking fields), alters hands (add phase/current_bet/pot_main). Since this is MVP with test data only, use clean migration approach.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Migration drops bot_versions and bots tables
AC-2: Migration creates agents table with correct schema
AC-3: Migration alters sessions, tables, hands per spec
GATE: alembic upgrade head runs without errors on clean DB
